# Fred Berthelot — Architect of The Mind

> Fred Berthelot is a corporate mentalist, magician, and speaker based in Denville, New Jersey. A former architect at Robert A.M. Stern Architects in New York City (25+ years), Fred now designs interactive mentalism experiences for corporate events, conferences, team-building programs, and private celebrations. He performs nationwide under the brand "Architect of The Mind."

## What Fred Does

Fred performs interactive mentalism — a form of live entertainment combining psychology, influence, and audience participation where attendees' thoughts are read, decisions are predicted, and perceptions are challenged. His performances are fully customized to each client's brand, event goals, and audience. He is not a traditional magician; his work focuses on the mind, not physical illusions.

## Corporate Programs

- **Blueprint of The Mind (Stage Show)**: A fully customized, interactive stage performance where the audience's thoughts serve as the blueprint. Ideal for conferences, annual meetings, sales kickoffs, holiday parties, and leadership retreats. Scalable for 20 to 300+ attendees.
- **VIP Strolling Mentalism**: Close-up, walk-around mentalism during cocktail hours and receptions. Fred engages small groups with personal demonstrations of mind reading and influence that spark conversation and connection.
- **Combined Experience (Strolling + Show)**: Reception mentalism followed by a full stage performance — the complete event entertainment package.
- **Workshops and Keynotes**: Interactive programs on memory training, creativity, and communication, drawing on Fred's architectural background and mentalism expertise.

## Industries Served

Fred specializes in corporate entertainment across these industries: pharmaceutical and life sciences, professional services and law firms, technology, finance, food and consumer goods, architecture and design, and healthcare. He has particular depth in the pharmaceutical sector, having performed for multiple pharma leadership teams and sales meetings.

## Notable Clients

ANI Pharmaceuticals, Arla Foods, Ascendion, Bell Works, Campbell's, CLA Connect, Colliers International, Daiichi Sankyo, dancker, Epsilon, Epstein Becker Green, Exeltis, Heller Industrial Park, Inspired by Somerset, Johnson & Johnson, Kelley Drye, Lowenstein Sandler LLP, MJH Life Sciences, Mondelez International, MSI International, MyCIL, Nelson Mullins Riley & Scarborough, Nextrove, Novartis, Nut Tree Capital, Progressive Hydraulics, Roche, SHI International, Sovos Brands, Unilever, Steelcase, Pfizer, Xiromed, Embecta.

## What Makes Fred Different

Fred spent 25+ years as a professional architect at Robert A.M. Stern Architects, one of New York City's most prestigious firms, designing corporate headquarters, university buildings, and business districts for Fortune 500 companies. He holds a Master's in Architecture (Summa Cum Laude) from the Savannah College of Art and Design. This background gives him deep understanding of corporate environments, high-stakes collaboration, and design thinking — skills he now applies to designing live experiences rather than buildings. He is a native French speaker and can perform in both English and French.

## Event Types

Corporate conferences, annual meetings, sales kickoffs, leadership retreats, team-building events, holiday parties, employee appreciation events, client appreciation dinners, product launches, galas, fundraisers, private milestone celebrations (birthdays, anniversaries), and trade show entertainment.

## Service Area

Based in Denville, New Jersey (45 minutes from Manhattan). Available for private events in the New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut tri-state area, and for corporate events nationwide and internationally.
